samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter to keep track of the number of received serial input data bits.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <equals>
                        <input_ref id="rst_n"/>
                        <bit>0</bit>
                    </equals>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <output_ref id="cnt"/> = 4'b0000;
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <output_ref id="dout_parallel"/> = 8'b00000000;
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <output_ref id="dout_valid"/> = 1'b0;
                    </assign>
                </then>
                <else>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <equals>
                                <input_ref id="din_valid"/>
                                <bit>1</bit>
                            </equals>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <output_ref id="cnt"/> = <output_ref id="cnt"/> + 4'b0001;
                            </assign>
                            <assign>
                                <output_ref id="dout_parallel"/> = <output_ref id="dout_parallel"/> << 1;
                            </assign>
                            <assign>
                                <output_ref id="dout_parallel[0]"/> = <input_ref id="din_serial"/>; 
                            </assign>
                            <if>
                                <condition>
                                    <equals>
                                        <output_ref id="cnt"/>  /> 4'b0111;
                                    </equals>
                                </condition>
                                <then>
                                    <assign>
                                        <output_ref id="dout_valid"/> = 1'b1;
                                    </assign>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <assign>
                                        <output_ref id="dout_valid"/> = 1'b0;
                                    </assign>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </else>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
